info.title: Zen AI API
info.description: OpenAI-compatible API for Zen AI with additional app-specific endpoints

BearerAuth.description: Use the API key from Zen AI settings

model.description: The model to use for completion, in format provider:model-id

accessible_paths.description: Array of directory paths the agent can access
Array of directory paths the agent can access

knowledge_base_ids.description: Optional list of knowledge base IDs to search. If not provided, searches all knowledge bases.

warnings.description: Warning messages for partial search failures

post.description: Creates a new autonomous agent with the specified configuration and automatically provisions an initial session that mirrors the agent's settings.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all agents

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Sort order (asc = ascending, desc = descending). Defaults to asc when sortBy is sort_order.

get.description: Retrieves a specific agent by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing agent with the provided data

patch.description: Partially updates an existing agent with only the provided fields

max_steps.description: Maximum steps the agent can take

schema.description: Only include the fields you want to update

delete.description: Deletes an agent and all associated sessions and logs

put.description: Sets the display order of agents based on the provided array of agent IDs

ordered_ids.description: Array of agent IDs in the desired display order

post.summary: Create a new session for an agent

ordered_ids.description: Array of session IDs in desired order

post.summary: Create a new message in a session

delete.summary: Delete a message from a session

404.description: Agent, session, or message not found

post.description: Create a chat completion response, compatible with OpenAI API

get.description: Returns a list of all configured knowledge bases

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of knowledge bases to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of knowledge bases to skip

get.summary: Get a knowledge base by ID

post.description:
Search across one or more knowledge bases and retrieve relevant document chunks.

Each result includes:
- `pageContent`: The text content of the matching chunk
- `score`: Similarity score (higher = more relevant)
- `metadata`: Additional information about the source document
- `knowledge_base_id` & `knowledge_base_name`: Source of the result

Results are sorted by relevance score in descending order.

example.query: How do I configure Ollama embedding?

results.pageContent: To use Ollama embeddings, set the base URL to http://localhost:11434
